basicDetails.schemeName: Promotion of Literature on Art & Culture of Local Authors/ Organization

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The scheme "Goa State Best Library and Best Librarian Award" has been designed by the Directorate of Art and Culture, Government of Goa to encourage Goan writers to publish their literature on Art and Culture. The entire expenditure on printing and publishing the book is borne by Govt. by keeping the copyright of the publication. Every year two or more books are published depending upon the availability of funds. About 1000 copies are printed and supplied to Educational institutions, libraries, Cultural Institutions etc.
> **Objectives** 1. To encourage Goan writers to publish their literature on Art & culture. 1. To bear the entire expenditure on printing and publishing of the book by keeping the copyright of the publication.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
> **Nature and Quantum of Assistance**


1. The entire expenditure on printing and publishing the book is borne by the Government by keeping the copyright of the publication. 
1. Every year two year or more books are published depending upon the availability of funds. 
1. About 1,000 copies are printed and supplied to Educational institutions, libraries, Cultural Institutions etc. 
1. The authors are paid an honorarium.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme "Goa State Best Library and Best Librarian Award" has been designed to encourage Goan writers to publish their literature on Art and Culture. The entire expenditure on printing and publishing the book is borne by Govt. by keeping the copyright of the publication.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: Authors who have already availed of the benefit shall not be considered for a second time.

children.text: The scheme "Goa State Best Library and Best Librarian Award" has been designed by the Directorate of Art and Culture, Government of Goa to encourage Goan writers to publish their literature on Art and Culture. The entire expenditure on printing and publishing the book is borne by Govt. by keeping the copyright of the publication. Every year two or more books are published depending upon the availability of funds. About 1000 copies are printed and supplied to Educational institutions, libraries, Cultural Institutions etc.
Objectives
To encourage Goan writers to publish their literature on Art & culture.
To bear the entire expenditure on printing and publishing of the book by keeping the copyright of the publication.
Nature and Quantum of Assistance
The entire expenditure on printing and publishing the book is borne by the Government by keeping the copyright of the publication.
Every year two year or more books are published depending upon the availability of funds.
About 1,000 copies are printed and supplied to Educational institutions, libraries, Cultural Institutions etc.
The authors are paid an honorarium.
Authors who have already availed of the benefit shall not be considered for a second time.
Step 1:
The interested applicant should visit the Directorate Of Art & Culture, Government of Goa, 5th Floor, Shram Shakti Bhavan, Panaji, Patto, Panaji, Goa - 403001
Step 2:
Request a hard copy of the proforma of the application form from the concerned authority.
Step 3:
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest if required).
Step 4:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the
ACO-II, Directorate of Art & Culture, Phone: 0832-2404623, Email: aco3-dac.goa@nic.in

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The interested applicant should visit the Directorate Of Art & Culture, Government of Goa, 5th Floor, Shram Shakti Bhavan, Panaji, Patto, Panaji, Goa - 403001
**Step 2:** Request a hard copy of the proforma of the application form from the concerned authority.
**Step 3:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest if required).
**Step 4:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the **ACO-II, Directorate of Art & Culture, Phone: 0832-2404623, Email: aco3-dac.goa@nic.in**

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be an author from Goa. 1. Only the literature concerned with the cultural traditions of the state of Goa shall be published.
**NOTE:** Authors who have already availed the benefit shall not be considered for a second time.

children.text: The applicant should be an author from Goa.
Only the literature concerned with the cultural traditions of the state of Goa shall be published.
NOTE:
Authors who have already availed the benefit shall not be considered for a second time.
